dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6627 IH: Improving the Enlisted to Officer Judge Advocate Program Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Elfreth (for herself and Mr. McCormick) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Armed Services

form.official-title: To amend section 2004 of title 10, United States Code, to increase the maximum number of years on active duty an enlisted member may serve and be eligible for detail as a student at a law school with funding provided by the Department of Defense, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Improving the Enlisted to Officer Judge Advocate Program Act.

section.header: Modification to maximum years of service for eligibility detail as a student at a law school

subsection.text: Section 2004(b)(1) of title 10, United States Code, is amended—

subparagraph.text: in the matter preceding clause (i), by striking detailed pursuant to subsection (a)(1) and inserting with respect to whom the Secretary of a military department is providing funding for educational expenses in accordance with subsection (a)(2); and
in clause (ii), by striking eight years and inserting 10 years; and

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (B) in the matter preceding clause (i), by striking detailed pursuant to subsection (a)(2) and inserting with respect to whom the Secretary of a military department is not providing funding for educational expenses in accordance with subsection (a)(3).

subsection.text: Section 2004(b)(3)(C) of title 10, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in clause (i), by striking subsection (a)(1) and inserting subsection (a)(2); and
in clause (ii), by striking subsection (a)(2) and inserting subsection (a)(3).
